question: What device model is the subject of the field recall packet WAIC-RECALL-2026-0408?
Who is the manufacturer of the TQ-9 portable infusion pump?
Which production lot was initially named in the primary field bulletin but later confirmed NOT to be subject to the recall?
What is the identifier of Sayfield's primary field bulletin?
What is the identifier of Sayfield's supplemental field bulletin?
Which inventory row corresponds to serial number TQ9-S/N-A7990?
In which room is pump TQ9-S/N-A8104 assigned?
Which firmware version was identified as the vulnerable version?
What is the current status of lot TQ9-LOT-2025-0521 in the Wheelock AIC inventory?
reference_answer: Released to service. All five units from lot 0521 are released; no firmware patch required.

question: What is the current status of lot TQ9-LOT-2025-0312 in the Wheelock AIC inventory?
reference_answer: On hold. Six units on hold, awaiting v2.11.5 patch deployment scheduled April 22-23, 2026.

question: What is the current status of lot TQ9-LOT-2025-0418 in the Wheelock AIC inventory?
reference_answer: On hold. Three units on hold, awaiting v2.11.5 patch deployment.

question: How many TQ-9 units in the Wheelock AIC inventory are currently on hold?
reference_answer: Nine (9) units on hold (6 from lot 0312, 3 from lot 0418).

question: How many TQ-9 units from lot 0521 have been released to service following the correction?
What firmware version is the patch that remediates the recall?
As of April 11, 2026, how many loaner pumps are deployed to floor 3B?
When does the loaner agreement LOAN-AGT-2026-0409 expire?
How many loaner pumps did Wheelock AIC receive from Sayfield Biomedical?
On what date were the loaner pumps received?
How many TQ-9 units total are in the Wheelock AIC inventory matching the lot ranges in the primary bulletin?
On what date was Sayfield's primary field bulletin issued?
On what date was the Wheelock AIC internal correction notice issued?
How many loaner pumps were deployed to floor 2A?
How many nurse reports were filed in connection with this recall window?
reference_answer: Three (3) nurse reports (NR-2026-031 from Bibulwicz, NR-2026-033 from Kontoleon, NR-2026-035 from Indaharu).

question: After the correction, how many lots remain on hold at Wheelock AIC?
Which nurse filed the report describing an E-32 error code alarm on serial A7831?
reference_answer: RN Ojárrè Bibulwicz, Floor 2A. Report NR-2026-031.

question: Which nurse reported pressure drift on pump TQ9-S/N-A8104?
reference_answer: RN Phaedra Kontoleon, Floor 3B. Report NR-2026-033.

question: Which nurse reported that no anomalies were observed on serial TQ9-S/N-A7990?
reference_answer: RN Wamukota Indaharu, Floor 4C. Report NR-2026-035.

question: Who is the Director of Pharmacy at Wheelock AIC who issued the internal correction notice?
What did BMET Trumbauer's note BMET-NOTE-2026-019 conclude about the three preceding nurse reports?
reference_answer: That all three reports are consistent with a firmware-level anomaly (alarm-generation and pressure-sensor polling) rather than a hardware fault; the Indaharu negative report does not exclude latent firmware vulnerability.

question: On what date and at what local time does Bibulwicz's report state the alarm on serial A7831 occurred?
Across which shifts did Kontoleon observe pressure drift on serial A8104?
reference_answer: Two consecutive shifts: the April 5 day shift and the April 5 night shift, observed across handoff.

question: Which nurse works on floor 3B per the nurse report headers?
Which manufacturer source statement about lot 0521 was superseded?
reference_answer: The statement in SBI-FB-2026-114 that lot 0521 was affected; superseded by SBI-FB-2026-114-S1.

question: What firmware version is installed on lot 0521 devices per the supplemental bulletin?
According to the supplemental bulletin, why is lot 0521 not subject to the recall?
reference_answer: Because lot 0521 shipped from a separate production line using firmware v2.11.4, not the vulnerable v2.11.3.

question: Who issued the supplemental field bulletin SBI-FB-2026-114-S1?
How many units changed status from on-hold to released following the internal correction notice?
reference_answer: Five (5) units (all lot-0521 units, rows ROW-INV-010 through ROW-INV-014).

question: How many lots are confirmed currently subject to the recall at Wheelock AIC after the correction?
Per the operative supersession in the packet, is lot 0521 currently released or on hold?
Who internally confirmed the manufacturer's lot-0521 correction at Wheelock AIC?
reference_answer: Erskine Drabolwicz, PharmD, Director of Pharmacy, via WAIC-CORR-2026-0411.
